Replaces the current channel and mirrors the change back into the context.

Replaces the current message component and mirrors the change back into the context.

Sets or clears the custom YoChat prefix for an offline player.

U

unregisterAllSteps() - Static method in class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.YoChatAPI
Alias for clearing all registered pipeline steps.
unregisterAllSteps(Stage) - Static method in class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.YoChatAPI
Alias for clearing all registered steps from a specific stage.
unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep) - Static method in class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.YoChatAPI
Unregisters a pipeline step from every stage where it is currently present.
unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep) - Method in class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin.ChatPipelineManager
Removes the given step instance from every stage where it is registered.
unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep, Stage) - Static method in class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.YoChatAPI
Unregisters a pipeline step from a specific stage.
unregisterStep(Stage, ChatPipelineStep) - Method in class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin.ChatPipelineManager
Removes the given step instance from a single stage.
UUID() - Method in record class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin.objects.MutedPlayer
Returns the value of the UUID record component.

Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

Y

YoChat - Class in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin
Main plugin entry point and runtime service provider for YoChat.
YoChat() - Constructor for class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin.YoChat
 
YoChatAPI - Class in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI
 
YoChatAPI() - Constructor for class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.YoChatAPI
 
YoChatChannelJoinEvent - Class in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events
Fired before a player is added to a YoChat channel.
YoChatChannelJoinEvent(Player, ChatChannel) - Constructor for class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events.YoChatChannelJoinEvent
Creates a new channel join event.
YoChatChannelLeaveEvent - Class in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events
Fired before a player is removed from a YoChat channel.
YoChatChannelLeaveEvent(Player, ChatChannel) - Constructor for class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events.YoChatChannelLeaveEvent
Creates a new channel leave event.
YoChatCommand - Class in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin.commands
 
YoChatCommand() - Constructor for class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin.commands.YoChatCommand
 
YoChatMessageEvent - Class in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events
Fired after the pipeline has produced the message component but before final send handling.
YoChatMessageEvent(Player, Component, ChatChannel) - Constructor for class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events.YoChatMessageEvent
Creates a new message event.
YoChatPipelineEvent - Class in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events
Fired immediately after YoChat's internal pipeline has executed.
YoChatPipelineEvent(Player, Component, ChatChannel, ChatContext) - Constructor for class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events.YoChatPipelineEvent
Creates a new pipeline event.
YoChatProvider - Interface in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.interfaces
Internal provider contract used to expose YoChat runtime services through the public API.
YoChatSendEvent - Class in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events
Fired right before YoChat hands the message off for final delivery.
YoChatSendEvent(Player, Component, ChatChannel) - Constructor for class me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events.YoChatSendEvent
Creates a new send event.
